## Workflow Area

Architecture / security / REST / admin / Gutenberg / testing / release / docs / other:

## Problem

What problem should this solve?

## Proposed Behavior

What should the skill, template, or script do?

## Alternatives Considered

What other approaches did you consider?

## Official Docs Or Source Links

Please include official WordPress, Codex, Claude Code, Cursor, npm, Composer, WP-CLI, PHPUnit, or related source links when relevant:
